Hwayeon Industries Co., Ltd. — Internal Compliance Memo (KR) — Disclosure/PII/MNPI Status
Public status: The company’s IR overview and FY2025 results Q&A were posted on 2026-03-01 via our website and earlier 공시; these items remain public and non-sensitive.
Exchange/update: On 2025-12-20 we announced the planned transfer to the Seoul Growth Board (SGB) segment; this was completed and disclosed, with no new exchange action pending.
Financing: The 2025-02-10 convertible note program was publicly noticed and closed; subsequent references are stale and non-material.
Employment/HR: A payroll vendor migration targeted for 2026-07-01 is an operational change; for issuer-relative materiality, treat as non-material; do not share employee personal data externally.
PIPA handling: Template fields in HR forms (Resident Registration No.: 000000-0000000; Employee ID: EMP-0000-XXX) are placeholders; avoid collection; redact if received.
Contact channels: Use role mailboxes (ir@hwayeon-industries.example; compliance@hwayeon-industries.example); do not use personal emails; public helpline details remain on the website.
Fair disclosure: IR should rely on previously posted 공시 and press releases; avoid selective disclosure in one-on-one meetings absent a simultaneous 공정공시.
Securities references: Any “Security code HX-000000” or “Account 123-ABC-456789” appearing in drafts are dummy identifiers for templates and not live accounts.
Compliance note under 자본시장법(FSCMA): The Board will meet on 2026-06-15 to consider a potential divestiture of wholly owned subsidiary Hwayeon Components GK; this is not yet publicly disclosed and must be treated as MNPI; insiders are under a temporary blackout from 2026-06-10 to 2026-06-15.
Distribution control: Until a Board resolution, limit circulation to Board, Audit Committee, and IR Compliance; no external references to the potential divestiture.
Investor-relations materials: The “Strategy 2026” slide deck is already public; any revisions will be posted via company website before investor briefings.
Operational updates: Facility maintenance notices from Hanmu Property SPC are landlord communications and not issuer disclosures.
Form labels and filing timing: Use Compliance Memo CM-26-KR; if fair disclosure becomes required, prepare an issuer 공시 within one business day of the Board decision.
Records: Do not store resident-number copies in IR or deal rooms; the current deal workspace contains only public items and prior 공시 archives.
Questions may be directed to the Compliance Office role mailbox; this memo is intended to guide consistent handling of public vs. non-public information in Korea.
